ADRClass.title: ADRClass
ADRClass.description: Specification of classes of dangerous goods according to ADR.

comparisonOperator.title: comparisonOperator
comparisonOperator.description: The operator to be used in the vehicle characteristic comparison operation.

yearOfFirstRegistration.title: yearOfFirstRegistration
yearOfFirstRegistration.description: Year of first registration of the vehicle.

ApplicableDaysWithinMonthEnum.title: ApplicableDaysWithinMonthEnum
ApplicableDaysWithinMonthEnum.description: Types of days within a month.

chemicalName.title: chemicalName
chemicalName.description: The chemical name of the hazardous substance carried by the vehicle.

dangerousGoodsFlashPoint.title: dangerousGoodsFlashPoint
dangerousGoodsFlashPoint.description: The temperature at which the vapour from a hazardous substance will ignite in air.

dangerousGoodsRegulations.title: dangerousGoodsRegulations
dangerousGoodsRegulations.description: The code defining the regulations, international or national, applicable for a means of transport.

hazardCodeVersionNumber.title: hazardCodeVersionNumber
hazardCodeVersionNumber.description: The version/revision number of date of issuance of the hazardous material code used.

hazardSubstanceItemPageNumber.title: hazardSubstanceItemPageNumber
hazardSubstanceItemPageNumber.description: A number giving additional hazard code classification of a goods item within the applicable dangerous goods regulation.

tremCardNumber.title: tremCardNumber
tremCardNumber.description: The identification of a transport emergency card giving advice for emergency actions.

undgNumber.title: undgNumber
undgNumber.description: A unique serial number assigned within the United Nations to substances and articles contained in a list of the dangerous goods most commonly carried.

volumeOfDangerousGoods.title: volumeOfDangerousGoods
volumeOfDangerousGoods.description: The volume of dangerous goods on the vehicle(s) reported in a traffic/travel situation.

weightOfDangerousGoods.title: weightOfDangerousGoods
weightOfDangerousGoods.description: The weight of dangerous goods on the vehicle(s) reported in a traffic/travel situation.

adrClassValue.title: adrClassValue
adrClassValue.description: The class of the dangerous good according to ADR.

EmissionsExtension.title: EmissionsExtension
EmissionsExtension.description: An extension for the Emissions class to provide a comparison operator.

comparisonOperator.title: comparisonOperator
comparisonOperator.description: A comparison operator for the applicable emission classifications in correspondence to the specified value. The comparison applies to the Roman- or Arabic-numbered portion (e.g. euro6 > euro5b), but not crosswise (e.g. euro6 cannot be compared to euroV).

EnginePowerCharacteristics.title: EnginePowerCharacteristics
EnginePowerCharacteristics.description: Characteristics of the engine power of a vehicle.

comparisonOperator.title: comparisonOperator
comparisonOperator.description: The operator to be used in the vehicle characteristic comparison operation.

enginePower.title: enginePower
enginePower.description: The engine power value of the vehicle.

unitOfMeasure.title: unitOfMeasure
unitOfMeasure.description: The unit in which the engine power is specified.

EuSpecialPurposeVehicleEnum.title: EuSpecialPurposeVehicleEnum
EuSpecialPurposeVehicleEnum.description: Vehicle purpose according to EU legislation.

EuVehicleCategoryEnum.title: EuVehicleCategoryEnum
EuVehicleCategoryEnum.description: Vehicle categories according to EU legislation.

beginOrDuration.title: beginOrDuration
beginOrDuration.description: Begin or duration of fuzzy time period.

endOrDuration.title: endOrDuration
endOrDuration.description: End or duration of fuzzy time period.

GrossTrailerWeightCharacteristics.title: GrossTrailerWeightCharacteristics
GrossTrailerWeightCharacteristics.description: Gross weight characteristic of a trailer of a vehicle.

comparisonOperator.title: comparisonOperator
comparisonOperator.description: The operator to be used in the trailer characteristic comparison operation.

grossTrailerWeight.title: grossTrailerWeight
grossTrailerWeight.description: The gross weight of the vehicle and its load, including any trailers.

typeOfWeight.title: typeOfWeight
typeOfWeight.description: The meaning of the weight value.

RegulatedCharacteristics.title: RegulatedCharacteristics
RegulatedCharacteristics.description: Characteristics as defined in EU and or national regulations.

euVehicleCategory.title: euVehicleCategory
euVehicleCategory.description: Vehicle categories as defined in EU Directive 2007/46/EG and Regulation (EU) No 168/2013.

euSpecialPurposeVehicle.title: euSpecialPurposeVehicle
euSpecialPurposeVehicle.description: vehicle purpose as defined in EU Directive 2007/46/EG

nationalSpecialPurposeVehicle.title: nationalSpecialPurposeVehicle
nationalSpecialPurposeVehicle.description: vehicle purpose as defined by national regulation

TrailerCharacteristics.title: TrailerCharacteristics
TrailerCharacteristics.description: The characteristics of a trailer e.g. gross weight of trailer.
